description_long: This is a rectangular wooden dining table with a medium-brown finish, accompanied by four matching chairs and a bench. The table features a simple, sturdy design with straight legs and a smooth, flat tabletop. The chairs have cross-back designs and dark-colored seats, while the bench has a light-colored cushioned seat. The set appears robust and functional, suitable for communal dining or gatherings. The wood grain is visible, giving the set a natural and classic appearance. There are no visible decorative carvings or embellishments, emphasizing a practical and timeless style.
description: A rectangular wooden dining table with four cross-back chairs and a cushioned bench, all in a classic, sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full table, four chairs, and the bench positioned on the far side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the table, the bench's cushion, and the alignment of the chairs.
description_view_2: Rear view with the bench in the foreground and all seating clearly visible around the table.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the bench and the arrangement of the chairs along the table.
